mapper.select: select id, location, ip, flag, mark, cameras, volume, is_warning, name, status from yn_siren where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into yn_siren(location, ip, flag, mark, cameras, volume, is_warning, name, status) values(#{location}, #{ip}, #{flag}, #{mark}, #{cameras}, #{volume}, #{isWarning}, #{name}, #{status})
mapper.update: update yn_siren set location=#{location}, ip=#{ip}, flag=#{flag}, mark=#{mark}, cameras=#{cameras}, volume=#{volume}, is_warning=#{isWarning}, name=#{name}, status=#{status} where id=#{id}
mapper.delete: delete from yn_siren where id in #{id}
